reference_expectation: Maintain, test, and review a disaster recovery plan for critical applications and infrastructure under POJK Article 18 and NIST recovery guidance.
public_evidence: Public statements describe staged restoration, but no disaster-recovery plan, test result, RTO, or RPO is published in the reviewed sources.

reference_expectation: Identify cyber assets, threats, and vulnerabilities under POJK Article 21 and SEOJK Sections II-III.
public_evidence: The public incident disclosures do not include an asset, threat, vulnerability, or dependency assessment.

reference_expectation: Perform and report cyber-risk and cybersecurity-maturity self-assessments under POJK Article 22 and SEOJK Sections II-IV.
public_evidence: No assessment result or maturity score is included in the reviewed public incident sources.

reference_expectation: Conduct periodic vulnerability-based and annual scenario-based cybersecurity testing under POJK Articles 23-25 and SEOJK Sections V-VI.
public_evidence: No vulnerability-test or scenario-test evidence is published in the reviewed sources.

reference_expectation: Detect cyber incidents and perform containment and recovery actions under POJK Article 21 and NIST incident-response guidance.
public_evidence: BSI disclosed cyberattack indications and a temporary switch-off of several channels, but detection timestamps, telemetry, and containment criteria are not public.
assessment_conclusion: Action is visible but effectiveness is not assessable

reference_expectation: Investigate incidents, preserve evidence, and coordinate with regulators and relevant parties under SEOJK and NIST guidance.
public_evidence: BSI disclosed audit and digital-forensic work; OJK confirmed ongoing coordination and requested acceleration of the forensic audit.
assessment_conclusion: Action is evidenced but audit scope and outcome are not public

reference_expectation: Restore impaired services using prioritized and tested recovery procedures under POJK Article 18 and NIST recovery guidance.
public_evidence: BSI and OJK published staged recovery statements between 9 and 13 May; no independently measured service-level data or recovery-test evidence is public.
assessment_conclusion: Recovery activity is visible but recovery capability is not fully assessable

reference_expectation: Protect personal data and perform impact assessment under POJK Articles 43-45 and Indonesia's PDP Law.
public_evidence: BSI stated customer data were safe while Reuters reported an unverified attacker claim; no public data-impact assessment is included in the reviewed primary sources.
assessment_conclusion: Do not conclude breach scope or privacy-control effectiveness

reference_expectation: Coordinate accurate incident and recovery communication under OJK supervisory expectations and NIST guidance.
public_evidence: BSI issued recovery statements and an apology; OJK issued a public update and referred to customer complaints and communication.
assessment_conclusion: Communication occurred; completeness and timeliness are not independently scored

reference_expectation: Use forensic findings and lessons learned to improve systems, controls, and recovery planning under POJK Articles 25-26 and NIST guidance.
public_evidence: The year-end filing states that corrective actions were taken and cybersecurity enhanced, without publishing implementation evidence or closure testing.
assessment_conclusion: Improvement is stated but design and operating effectiveness remain unverified
